creator: phantom@scropion.crimea.ua
text:
ftp.mirros was not synched with handbook for while,
	therefore information for many mirrors was not available
	from ftp.cgi. Just for note: 8 countries and 35 cites
	were not mentioned there

Fix: What's done:
	. Synching ftp mirrors list with appropriate handbook
	  section (35 new sites added)
	. Fix ordering
	. freebsd.org  -> FreeBSD.org

Patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ftp.cgi
